claim: Skills are reusable, composable workflows bundled as tools; use for cross-project automation to avoid reinventing processes
actionable: Wrap domain-specific workflows as skills; invoke them across projects to eliminate duplication and maintain consistency
source_title: You're Using Claude Code Wrong (Skills vs Subagents vs Hooks during Pentest)

claim: Subagents spawn independent parallel tasks with own context; better than sequential for offloading work without polluting main context
actionable: Use subagents to parallelize work (UI review, docs, tests) in separate context windows rather than sequentially
source_title: You're Using Claude Code Wrong (Skills vs Subagents vs Hooks during Pentest)
